summary: Herion v10 Batch 4 Testing Complete - Alert Center, Security Monitoring, Document Vault all working. 21/21 backend tests passed, all frontend features verified.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Batch 4 Alert Center, Security Monitoring, Document Vault fully tested and working. All 21 backend API tests pass. Frontend pages load correctly with all features functional. Navigation visibility correct for all roles.

endpoints_tested: GET /api/alerts - returns sections (high_critical, new, practice, security, governance, resolved) and counts
GET /api/alerts/summary - returns open and urgent counts

features_verified: Filter tabs (Tutte, Alta Priorita, Nuove, Pratiche, Sicurezza, Governance, Risolte)
Sections displayed (Alta Priorita with 3 alerts, Risolte with 1 alert)
Alert items with severity badges (Alto, Aperta)

endpoints_tested: GET /api/security/events - returns events (admin/creator only, 403 for users)
security_monitoring_api.threshold_auto_alert: 3+ failed logins in 1 hour triggers auto-alert

endpoints_tested: GET /api/vault - returns documents with vault_status, sensitivity_level, verification_status
GET /api/vault/summary - returns total, verified, pending_review, rejected, high_sensitivity
document_vault_api.role_based_visibility: admin/creator see all, users see own documents only

features_verified: Summary cards (Totali, Verificati, Da verificare, Rifiutati, Alta sensibilita)
Category filters (Tutte, Identita, Fiscale, Aziendale, Contabilita, Pagamento, Delega)
Document list with metadata (vault_status, sensitivity_level, verification_status)
Verify buttons for admin (3 buttons for non-verified documents)
